title: Job Opening Teacher at TeamLease Skills University

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at TeamLease Skills University
jsonLd.description:
Join the TeamLease Skills University family as a Teacher in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TeamLease Skills University:
TeamLease Skills University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TeamLease Skills University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
